title: thebasics-handbook-title-staff
text: Staff and server tools are permission-gated. Most staff commands require the configured staff privilege, and server config commands require root. Staff notes - /adminnotes <player>, aliases /anotes and /staffnotes: open shared staff-only notes. - Structured staff commands: list, add, view, edit, delete <id> confirm. - Freeform staff ledger: /adminnotes <player> ledger view and ledger set <text>. Character sheet staff commands - /adminviewcharsheet <player>: view all fields, including admin-only fields. Aliases include /adminviewsheet and /adminviewbio. - /adminsetcharsheet <player> <field> <value>: set a field. Aliases include /adminsetsheet and /adminsetbio. - /adminclearcharsheet <player> [field]: clear one field or all editable fields. - /adminclearheadshot <player>: clear another player's headshot. Identity and language staff commands - /adminsetnick <player> <nickname>: set a nickname. Use force before the nickname to bypass conflict warnings. - /adminsetnickcolor <player> <color>: set nickname color. - /adminaddlang, /adminremovelang, and /adminlistlang: manage player languages when the language system is enabled. Stats and server config - /clearstats <player> confirm: clear all stats for an online player. - /clearstat <player> <stat> confirm: clear one stat. Valid stat names include DEATHS, KILLS_PLAYER, KILLS_NPC, BLOCK_BREAKS, and DISTANCE_TRAVELLED. - /thebasics config: open the config panel. - /thebasics config languages: edit language definitions. - /thebasics config charsheetfields: edit character sheet fields. - /thebasics reloadconfig: reload ModConfig/the_basics.json. If the config UI reports restart-required settings, schedule a restart before assuming those changes are active.
